items.title: April 2026 TIGER Update: A Year of Economic Healing Turns Into a Year of Peril — Brookings
items.author: www.brookings.edu
items.snippet:
Global markets on April 18, 2026 are being shaped primarily by the Middle East conflict and its economic ripple effects. U.S. equities closed higher — S&P 500 +1.2% to 7,125, Dow +1.79% to 49,447, Nasdaq +1.52% — after President Trump signaled Iranian officials were seeking a deal to end hostilities. This lifted Treasuries and pulled oil prices lower, easing the stagflationary pressure that has dominated sentiment in recent weeks. The U.S. dollar weakened on the Iran deal headlines.

items.title: Why the stock market is hitting records despite Iran war
items.author: www.cnbc.com
items.snippet: U.S. equity markets have rebounded sharply in April 2026 after a turbulent start to the year, with the S&P 500 closing above 7,000 for the first time on April 15. The rally follows a major de-escalation in the U.S.-China trade war: after markets cratered more than 12% earlier in the year, the Trump administration announced a 90-day tariff pause. Under a subsequent deal, U.S. tariffs on Chinese imports fell to 30% (from 145%) while China's tariffs on U.S. goods dropped to 10% (from 125%), providi

items.title: Stock Market Today: Dow, S&P Live Updates for April 13 (Oil Surges, US Futures Drop on Hormuz Blockade) - Bloomberg
items.author: www.bloomberg.com
items.snippet: Global markets in mid-April 2026 are heavily influenced by ongoing Middle East geopolitical tensions, particularly the Iran conflict, which has rattled equities, commodities, and emerging market currencies. The IMF's April 2026 World Economic Outlook downgraded global growth to 3.1% for 2026 and 3.2% for 2027, citing rising commodity prices, firmer inflation expectations, and tighter financial conditions stemming from the war. Oil prices have been volatile — surging on Hormuz blockade fears earl

items.title: Wall Street Extends April Surge on Peace Prospects: Markets Wrap
items.author: www.bloomberg.com
items.snippet: Global markets have staged a remarkable recovery through mid-April 2026, driven largely by geopolitical de-escalation in the Middle East. Iran's declaration that the Strait of Hormuz is "completely open" for commercial traffic triggered a broad risk-on rally, with the S&P 500 crossing 7,100 for the first time and the Dow surging over 1,000 points on April 16. The index has now risen in 10 of the past 11 sessions, gaining more than 10% over that stretch, and is up roughly 2% since the US-Israeli

items.title: Kalshi - Prediction Market for Trading the Future
items.author: kalshi.com
items.snippet: Automated trading on prediction markets like Kalshi and Polymarket has matured significantly into 2026. On Kalshi (CFTC-regulated, 62% of on-chain prediction market volume at $500M+ weekly), multiple bot architectures have emerged: AI multi-agent systems using Grok-4 integration with Kelly-sizing and 5-gate risk engines, fundamental research bots that generate independent probability estimates and compute edge vs. live order books, and cross-platform arbitrage bots that exploit price discrepanci

items.title: Generating Alpha: A Hybrid AI-Driven Trading System (ComSIA 2026)
items.author: arxiv.org
items.snippet: Recent research from 2025–2026 shows a strong convergence of deep learning, reinforcement learning, and LLM-based approaches in quantitative trading strategy development. A hybrid AI trading system accepted at ComSIA 2026 combines XGBoost signal generation, FinBERT sentiment analysis, and market regime filtering with traditional technical indicators (EMA, MACD, RSI, Bollinger Bands), achieving a 135.49% return over 24 months. items.title: GitHub - rodlaf/KalshiMarketMaker: Simple market making strategies on Kalshi
items.author: github.com
items.snippet: GitHub hosts a rich ecosystem of market making strategy implementations spanning traditional finance, crypto, and prediction markets. The most academically rigorous implementations center on the Avellaneda-Stoikov model, which computes reservation prices and asymmetric bid/ask quotes based on inventory risk and volatility. Notable repositories include mmssss/hft-market-making (HFT backtesting simulator with Stoikov strategy), KodAgge/Reinforcement-Learning-for-Market-Making (tabular and deep RL

items.title: Alpaca MCP Server Documentation
items.author: docs.alpaca.markets
items.snippet: Alpaca has been active with API development in early 2026, most notably launching MCP Server V2, a complete rebuild that expands tool coverage from 43 to 61 endpoints with automatic spec sync against their OpenAPI spec. New endpoints include order replacement, full option chain browsing, market screeners, and account activity history. The update also introduces toolset filtering via the ALPACA_TOOLSETS setting so AI assistants can be scoped to specific capabilities. Alpaca was also recognized as
